error_signature: SASL: SCRAM-SERVER-FINAL-MESSAGE: server signature is missing
title: Connection error to Supabase PostgreSQL database
symptom: When attempting to connect to a Supabase PostgreSQL database using n8n, the error 'SASL: SCRAM-SERVER-FINAL-MESSAGE: server signature is missing' is displayed.
not_this_if: Connection works in other GUI clients like Postico
root_cause: The error occurs due to incorrect or outdated connection parameters in n8n. Supabase may have updated its connection settings, requiring users to refresh their credentials and connection details in n8n.
fix_steps: Access your Supabase dashboard and click the connect button.
Scroll down to 'Transaction pooler' and view the parameters.
Copy the connection parameters and paste them into a new PostgreSQL credential in n8n.
Go to Project Settings > Database in Supabase to find your database password.
Reset the password if necessary to copy it, then paste it into the n8n credential.
Create a new PostgreSQL node in your workflow and select the updated credential.
agent_instruction: Update your PostgreSQL credentials in n8n with the latest connection parameters from Supabase.
